values.description: Your Algolia Application ID. Found in the Algolia dashboard under API Keys.
Admin API key with Ingestion read permissions. Found in the Algolia dashboard under API Keys.
Ingestion API base URL. Set to us (https://data.us.algolia.com) or eu (https://data.eu.algolia.com) to match your Algolia application region.
ID of a specific authentication resource. Use List Authentications to find available IDs.
ID of a specific destination resource. Use List Destinations to find available IDs.
ID of a specific source resource. Use List Sources to find available IDs.
ID of a specific task resource. Use List Tasks to find available IDs.
ID of a specific transformation resource. Use List Transformations to find available IDs.
